title: UpdatedAt field is missing for Groups , Items, Docs

posts.author: sairamaraju (Sai )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Team,

We have observed UpdatedAt field is missing for Groups , Items, Docs in List API’s. Can you please help us in exposing the UpdatedAt field.

monday.com Platform API

Items

Learn how to read, create, update, and delete items from monday boards using the platform API

Please let us know if there are any workarounds or when this can be delivered.

Thanks in Advance.
